title: Password Generator
description: Generate strong, secure random passwords instantly. Customize length, include symbols, numbers, and uppercase letters.
shortDescription: Create strong, random passwords in one click.

faqItems.question: How secure are the generated passwords?
faqItems.answer: Passwords are generated entirely in your browser using the Web Crypto API. They are never sent to any server, making them extremely secure.

faqItems.question: What is a strong password?
faqItems.answer: A strong password is at least 16 characters long and includes a mix of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special symbols.

faqItems.question: How often should I change my password?
faqItems.answer: Security experts recommend changing passwords every 3-6 months, or immediately if you suspect a breach.

title: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text. Get reading time estimates and keyword density instantly.
shortDescription: Count words, characters, and reading time in seconds.

faqItems.question: Does this tool save my text?
faqItems.answer: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your text is never sent to any server.

faqItems.question: How is reading time calculated?
faqItems.answer: Reading time is calculated based on an average reading speed of 200 words per minute.

faqItems.question: What counts as a word?
faqItems.answer: Any sequence of characters separated by spaces or punctuation counts as one word.

title: Color Palette Generator
description: Generate beautiful, harmonious color palettes for your design projects. Create complementary, triadic, or analogous color schemes instantly.
shortDescription: Generate stunning color palettes for your designs.

faqItems.question: What color formats are supported?
faqItems.answer: Palettes are displayed in HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Click any value to copy it to your clipboard.

faqItems.question: What is a complementary color scheme?
faqItems.answer: Complementary colors are opposite each other on the color wheel, creating high contrast and vibrant combinations.

faqItems.question: Can I export the palette?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you can copy individual HEX codes or copy the entire palette as a JSON array.

title: Pomodoro Timer
description: Boost your productivity with the Pomodoro Technique. Customize work sessions, short breaks, and long breaks to maximize your focus.
shortDescription: Stay focused with a customizable Pomodoro timer.

faqItems.question: What is the Pomodoro Technique?
faqItems.answer: The Pomodoro Technique is a time management method that uses 25-minute focused work sessions separated by short breaks to improve productivity.

faqItems.question: Can I customize the timer durations?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can set custom durations for work sessions (default 25 min), short breaks (5 min), and long breaks (15 min).

faqItems.question: Will the timer notify me when a session ends?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The timer plays a sound notification and shows a browser notification when each session ends.

title: Readability Checker
description: Analyze your text's readability with Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, and SMOG scores. Improve your writing clarity and reach a wider audience.
shortDescription: Measure how easy your text is to read.

faqItems.question: What is a Flesch Reading Ease score?
faqItems.answer: Flesch Reading Ease scores range from 0-100. Scores above 60 are considered easy to read, suitable for general audiences. Below 30 is considered very difficult.

faqItems.question: What grade level should my content target?
faqItems.answer: For web content targeting a general audience, aim for a 7th-8th grade reading level (Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level 7-8).

faqItems.question: What is a Gunning Fog Index?
faqItems.answer: The Gunning Fog Index estimates the years of education needed to understand the text. A score of 12 means a high school graduate can understand it.

title: UUID Generator
description: Generate random UUIDs (v4) and ULIDs instantly. Bulk generate multiple unique identifiers for development and testing.
shortDescription: Generate unique IDs for your projects instantly.

faqItems.question: What is a UUID?
faqItems.answer: A UUID (Universally Unique Identifier) is a 128-bit label used to uniquely identify objects in software systems. UUID v4 is randomly generated.

faqItems.question: Are generated UUIDs truly unique?
faqItems.answer: UUID v4 has 2^122 possible values, making collisions astronomically unlikely. They are safe to use as unique identifiers.

faqItems.question: What is the difference between UUID and ULID?
faqItems.answer: ULIDs are lexicographically sortable and contain a timestamp component, making them useful for database records where ordering by creation time matters.

title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
description: Encode and decode text and files to/from Base64 format instantly. Essential for web development, API testing, and data encoding tasks.
shortDescription: Encode and decode Base64 strings in your browser.

faqItems.question: What is Base64 encoding?
faqItems.answer: Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme that represents binary data using 64 ASCII characters. It is commonly used to embed images in HTML and transmit data over text-based protocols.

faqItems.question: Is Base64 a form of encryption?
faqItems.answer: No. Base64 is encoding, not encryption. It can be easily decoded by anyone. Never use it to secure sensitive data.

faqItems.question: Can I encode binary files?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can upload any file and this tool will output its Base64 encoded string, which you can use in CSS data URLs or HTML img tags.

title: JSON Formatter & Validator
description: Format, beautify, and validate JSON data online. Minify JSON for production or pretty-print it for debugging. Instant syntax error detection.
shortDescription: Format and validate JSON data instantly.

faqItems.question: What does JSON formatting do?
faqItems.answer: JSON formatting adds proper indentation and line breaks to minified JSON, making it human-readable. It is the reverse of JSON minification.

faqItems.question: Can this tool fix invalid JSON?
faqItems.answer: The tool detects and highlights syntax errors, but cannot automatically fix them. It will tell you the exact line and character where the error occurs.

faqItems.question: Is my JSON data safe?
faqItems.answer: Yes. All formatting happens locally in your browser. Your JSON data is never sent to our servers.

title: Markdown Preview
description: Write Markdown and see a live HTML preview instantly. Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown including tables, code blocks, and task lists.
shortDescription: Live Markdown editor with instant HTML preview.

faqItems.question: What Markdown features are supported?
faqItems.answer: Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown including headings, bold, italic, links, images, code blocks with syntax highlighting, tables, and task lists.

faqItems.question: Can I export the HTML output?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Click the 'Copy HTML' button to copy the rendered HTML to your clipboard, ready to paste into your project.

faqItems.question: Does this save my content?
faqItems.answer: Your content is saved to your browser's local storage automatically, so it persists between sessions. Nothing is sent to any server.

title: CSS Gradient Generator
description: Create beautiful CSS linear and radial gradients visually. Copy production-ready CSS code instantly for your web projects.
shortDescription: Create and copy CSS gradients in seconds.

faqItems.question: What types of gradients can I create?
faqItems.answer: You can create linear gradients (straight lines at any angle) and radial gradients (circular or elliptical from a center point).

faqItems.question: Is the generated CSS cross-browser compatible?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The generated CSS includes standard syntax that works in all modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).

faqItems.question: Can I add more than two colors?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can add unlimited color stops to create complex multi-color gradients.

title: URL Encoder / Decoder
description: Encode and decode URLs instantly. Convert special characters into % hex sequences or restore them back to plain text.
shortDescription: Encode and decode URL parameter strings.

faqItems.question: Why do we need to encode URLs?
faqItems.answer: URLs can only contain ASCII characters. Special characters, spaces, and non-ASCII symbols must be encoded to prevent link corruption.

faqItems.question: What is percent-encoding?
faqItems.answer: Percent-encoding replaces unsafe characters with a '%' symbol followed by their two-digit hexadecimal representation.

faqItems.question: Is URL encoding secure?
faqItems.answer: No. It is a standard data format conversion, not encryption. Anyone can decode it.

title: Case Converter
description: Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, and slug-case instantly.
shortDescription: Transform text between different case styles.

faqItems.question: What is Title Case?
faqItems.answer: Title Case capitalizes the first letter of each major word, commonly used for headings and titles.

faqItems.question: What is camelCase?
faqItems.answer: camelCase removes spaces and capitalizes every word except the first one, commonly used in programming.

faqItems.question: Does it support paragraph text?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can paste large paragraphs, and the Sentence Case will correctly capitalize the first word of each sentence.

title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
description: Generate custom dummy placeholder text for your UI designs, mockups, and layout templates.
shortDescription: Generate placeholder dummy text instantly.

faqItems.question: What is Lorem Ipsum?
faqItems.answer: It is a standard placeholder text used in printing and typesetting industries since the 1500s to demonstrate visual layouts.

faqItems.question: Can I control the generated length?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can generate custom numbers of paragraphs, sentences, or words, and choose whether to start with 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet'.

faqItems.question: Is the generated text actual Latin?
faqItems.answer: No, it is a scrambled version of a Cicero passage, structured to mimic normal English word distributions.

title: HTML Entities Encoder / Decoder
description: Convert special characters into HTML entities (e.g. < or <) to display HTML code safely as text in browsers.
shortDescription: Encode or decode HTML entity tags safely.

faqItems.question: What is HTML escaping?
faqItems.answer: HTML escaping replaces special characters like '<' or '&' with safe entity names to prevent the browser from rendering them as code.

faqItems.question: What is the difference between named and numeric entities?
faqItems.answer: Named entities use readable names (like &), while numeric entities use character codes (like &). Both render identically.

faqItems.question: Does this protect against XSS?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Escaping user input before rendering it in HTML is a primary defense against Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.

title: Hash Generator
description: Generate cryptographic MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 hashes from any text input directly in your browser.
shortDescription: Create secure MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256 hashes.

faqItems.question: What is a cryptographic hash?
faqItems.answer: A hash is a fixed-size string generated from input text. The same input always yields the same hash, but you cannot reconstruct the input from the hash.

faqItems.question: Is MD5 still secure?
faqItems.answer: No. MD5 is vulnerable to collision attacks. It should only be used for integrity checks or legacy purposes, not for securing passwords.

faqItems.question: Does my text go to your servers?
faqItems.answer: No. All hashes are calculated locally using the browser's Web Crypto API or JS library, protecting your data.

title: Epoch Time Converter
description: Convert Unix epoch timestamps to human-readable dates and convert GMT/Local dates back to epoch values.
shortDescription: Convert Unix timestamps to readable dates.

faqItems.question: What is Unix Epoch time?
faqItems.answer: Unix time is the number of seconds (or milliseconds) elapsed since January 1, 1970 (UTC), excluding leap seconds.

faqItems.question: How do I convert milliseconds instead of seconds?
faqItems.answer: The tool automatically detects whether you pasted a 10-digit number (seconds) or a 13-digit number (milliseconds) and parses accordingly.

faqItems.question: What timezones are supported?
faqItems.answer: The converter displays dates in both Coordinated Universal Time (UTC/GMT) and your local system timezone.

title: Text Diff Checker
description: Compare two text documents side-by-side to highlight additions, deletions, and inline modifications instantly.
shortDescription: Compare text differences side-by-side.

faqItems.question: How are changes highlighted?
faqItems.answer: Red highlights represent deleted text or lines, and green highlights represent added lines or character changes.

faqItems.question: Is there a limit on text size?
faqItems.answer: The diffing engine is lightweight, meaning it can compare small snippets up to entire source files of several thousand lines.

faqItems.question: Are my files uploaded?
faqItems.answer: No. The text diff algorithm runs entirely in-memory inside your browser, ensuring absolute code privacy.

title: User Agent Parser
description: Parse any browser user agent string to identify details about the browser version, operating system, layout engine, and device vendor.
shortDescription: Analyze and decode user agent strings.

faqItems.question: What is a User Agent?
faqItems.answer: A user agent is a header string that browsers send to servers, identifying the client browser type, version, OS, and rendering engine.

faqItems.question: Can I test my own browser's user agent?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The tool automatically detects your current browser's user agent and pre-populates it on page load.

faqItems.question: Why is a user agent string so messy?
faqItems.answer: For historical compatibility. Modern browsers include 'Mozilla/5.0' and reference layout engines like 'AppleWebKit' to prevent old sites from blocking them.

title: Text to Slug Generator
description: Convert article titles, headings, and names into clean, URL-friendly lowercase slugs by stripping punctuation and replacing spaces with dashes.
shortDescription: Generate clean, SEO-friendly URL slugs.

faqItems.question: What is a URL slug?
faqItems.answer: A slug is the human-readable part of a URL that describes the page contents, typically consisting of lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes.

faqItems.question: Does this strip emojis and symbols?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The tool automatically removes symbols, brackets, question marks, and other characters that are invalid or unreadable in URLs.

faqItems.question: Is it customizable?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you can choose whether to preserve numbers, keep specific separators, or toggle lowercase enforcement.

title: SQL Formatter
description: Format, beautify, and auto-indent SQL scripts, SELECT queries, updates, and DDL scripts for readability.
shortDescription: Beautify and format SQL scripts instantly.

faqItems.question: Which SQL dialects are supported?
faqItems.answer: The formatter outputs standard ANSI SQL, which is highly readable and compatible with MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL, Oracle, and SQLite.

faqItems.question: Will formatting break my query syntax?
faqItems.answer: No. The formatter only adjusts whitespace, line breaks, and indentation; it never modifies keyword spelling or identifiers.

faqItems.question: Does it format nested queries?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Subqueries and complex joins are correctly indented with hierarchical levels to improve readability.

title: CSS Minifier
description: Compress CSS scripts by removing comments, redundant spaces, and line breaks to optimize load speeds.
shortDescription: Compress CSS stylesheets for production.

faqItems.question: What is CSS minification?
faqItems.answer: Minification removes unnecessary characters (like comments, extra spaces, and newlines) from CSS without changing its visual output, reducing file size.

faqItems.question: Does it support modern CSS variables?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Custom properties, variables, media queries, and utility layouts are fully supported without truncation.

faqItems.question: How much file size can I save?
faqItems.answer: Uncompressed CSS files typically shrink by 20% to 50% depending on the amount of comments and spacing in the original stylesheet.

title: JavaScript Minifier
description: Minify JavaScript scripts by stripping comments, logging statements, and collapsing spaces for production builds.
shortDescription: Minify and compress JavaScript scripts.

faqItems.question: How does this minifier work?
faqItems.answer: It removes whitespaces, removes comments, and optimizes code blocks. This results in smaller payloads and faster browser parsing.

faqItems.question: Will my JS code execute the same way?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Only non-functional formatting elements are stripped. The logic, scopes, and variable bindings remain identical.

faqItems.question: Is it safe to run in my browser?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Minification is completed locally inside the sandbox of your browser tab.

title: Color Code Converter
description: Convert colors instantly between Hex (#ffffff), RGB (255,255,255), and HSL (0, 0%, 100%) color models.
shortDescription: Convert between Hex, RGB, and HSL formats.

faqItems.question: What color formats are supported?
faqItems.answer: Hex (including 3-digit shorthand), RGB/RGBA, and HSL/HSLA color models.

faqItems.question: Does it support opacity channels?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Converting Hex with alpha channels (e.g. #ffffff80) yields corresponding RGBA and HSLA opacity outputs.

faqItems.question: Is there a live visual preview?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The tool features a live color box that updates instantly as you change values.

title: Binary Converter
description: Convert normal text to binary code sequences (e.g. 01000001) and translate binary back to ASCII text.
shortDescription: Translate text to binary and vice versa.

faqItems.question: How does text translate to binary?
faqItems.answer: Each character is mapped to its ASCII or Unicode numeric code point, which is then represented as an 8-bit binary number.

faqItems.question: Can I format binary output?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can choose whether to separate binary bytes with spaces or keep them concatenated in a single string.

faqItems.question: Does it support non-English characters?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it supports UTF-8 characters, meaning foreign scripts, emojis, and symbols are translated correctly.

title: Regex Tester
description: Validate regular expressions and test strings with real-time match highlighting, capturing groups, and expression flags.
shortDescription: Test regular expressions in real-time.

faqItems.question: Which Regex flavor is used?
faqItems.answer: This tool uses the browser's native JavaScript Regular Expressions engine, supporting standard flags like g, i, m, and u.

faqItems.question: What is highlighted in the test string?
faqItems.answer: Matching substrings are highlighted in real-time. If you define capturing groups, their captures are displayed separately.

faqItems.question: Does it detect infinite loops?
faqItems.answer: The tester includes standard safeguards to prevent freezing your browser in case of catastrophic backtracking.

title: QR Code Generator
description: Create custom high-resolution QR codes for websites, plain text, WiFi passwords, or contact info instantly.
shortDescription: Create custom QR codes instantly.

faqItems.question: What data can be stored in a QR code?
faqItems.answer: URLs, text, contact details, SMS templates, or email fields. For URLs, scanning will automatically open the browser.

faqItems.question: Can I adjust the QR code resolution?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The generated QR code renders on a scalable canvas, allowing you to download high-resolution PNG images.

faqItems.question: How secure is this generator?
faqItems.answer: The QR code generates locally using a client-side javascript library. Your URLs and text are never sent to external servers.

title: JSON to YAML Converter
description: Convert JSON arrays and nested structures into clean, readable, space-indented YAML format instantly.
shortDescription: Convert JSON structures to YAML format.

faqItems.question: Why convert JSON to YAML?
faqItems.answer: YAML is more human-readable than JSON because it uses indentation rather than brackets and quotes, making it ideal for configuration files.

faqItems.question: Does it format nested objects?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Nested objects, key-value pairs, and arrays are converted to clean, hierarchical yaml format.

faqItems.question: Is it safe to paste credentials?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Like all our developer tools, conversions happen locally inside your browser session.

title: YAML to JSON Converter
description: Convert YAML config files into standard JSON format, validating syntax and highlighting indentation errors.
shortDescription: Convert YAML config files to JSON.

faqItems.question: What are common use cases for YAML to JSON?
faqItems.answer: Converting Kubernetes configs, CI/CD pipeline definitions, or cloud configs (like AWS CloudFormation) to inspect them in JSON-consuming systems.

faqItems.question: What happens if my YAML has syntax errors?
faqItems.answer: The parser highlights indentation, naming, and key duplication errors, helping you fix the YAML layout.

faqItems.question: Does it support anchor/alias references?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Standard YAML references (& and *) are resolved during translation to represent valid duplicated JSON nodes.

title: XML to JSON Converter
description: Convert structured XML tags, nested nodes, and attributes into standard JSON arrays and objects instantly.
shortDescription: Convert XML schemas to JSON documents.

faqItems.question: How are XML attributes represented in JSON?
faqItems.answer: XML attributes are typically mapped as prefix key properties (e.g. '@attributeName') inside the parsed JSON object node.

faqItems.question: Does it support CDATA blocks?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Text sections wrapped in CDATA elements are preserved as plain string properties in the output JSON.

faqItems.question: Is my XML schema validated?
faqItems.answer: Yes, the parser checks if tags are properly nested and closed, showing errors for malformed XML schemas.

title: Image Metadata Extractor
description: Inspect image properties including MIME format, dimensions, size, color space, and embedded EXIF metadata.
shortDescription: View image EXIF metadata online.

faqItems.question: What is EXIF metadata?
faqItems.answer: EXIF is a standard metadata format embedded in image files, containing camera settings, date taken, device model, and GPS coordinate fields.

faqItems.question: Does my image upload to a server?
faqItems.answer: No. The tool reads file headers locally using client-side JavaScript APIs, protecting your photo privacy.

faqItems.question: Which image formats are supported?
faqItems.answer: PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, and SVG files can be inspected.
